app.name: Our Pins
app.filesTooltip: Open shared Google Drive (members can upload)

auth.needInvite: You'll need an invite from Mako to join.
auth.noInviteBody: Our Pins is private and invite-only. Ask Mako or a community admin for an invite link.
auth.linkExpired: Your sign-in link expired or was already used. Enter your email below to get a new one.
auth.signInError: Something went wrong signing you in. Try again with the form below.
auth.privacyNote: Sign-in is only used to confirm your identity. Your email address is visible to community admins only.

invite.expiredBody: This invite link is no longer active. Ask Mako for a new one.

onboarding.title: Let's set you up
onboarding.realNameHelp: Only Mako and admins see this. Optional but appreciated.
onboarding.avatarHelp: Required. Helps people recognise you on the map.
onboarding.bioHelp: Tell the community a little about yourself — where you live, what you do.

guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
guidelines.intro: Our Pins is a small, invite-only community of Greeks living in Japan.

rules.title: Vouch for places you actually know
rules.body: A pin or a vouch means "I've been here and I'd send a friend." Don't recommend places you haven't experienced yourself.

rules.title: Keep it real and relevant
rules.body: No spam, ads, or repeated self-promotion. Share things that genuinely help the community.

rules.title: Respect people's privacy
rules.body: Don't share another member's personal details, photos, or contact info without their consent.

rules.title: High-stakes tips are opinions, not professional advice
rules.body: Recommendations for doctors, lawyers, therapists, accountants and the like are personal experiences from members — not a substitute for qualified professional advice. Use your own judgment.

rules.title: Post in good faith on the Board and Resources
rules.body: Board = real needs (jobs, housing, events); Resources = lasting references. Quality over quantity.

rules.title: Admins keep the space healthy
rules.body: Admins may remove content or a member's access if needed. See something off? Tell the admin.

guidelines.closing: Questions, or something feel wrong? Message an admin. Thanks for helping keep Our Pins a place we all trust.

guide.title: How Our Pins works
guide.intro: A quick tour of everything you can do here.

sections.title: What it is
sections.body: A private map of places we trust — restaurants, doctors, weekend trips and more — each vouched for by a member. If it's pinned, someone here has actually been.

sections.title: Finding a place
sections.body: Browse the pins on the map. Use the Categories dropdown to filter by type and see how many of each there are, then tap a pin to see who vouched and what they said.

sections.title: Adding a place
sections.body: Tap any spot on the map, or use the + button. If nobody's pinned it yet, pick a category and write why you'd send a friend — that's your first vouch.

sections.title: Vouching and photos
sections.body: On a place someone already pinned, tap "I've been here too" and add a comment if you like. On your own pins you can add up to four photos.

sections.title: Board and Resources
sections.body: The Board is for time-limited needs — jobs, housing, things for sale, events — and posts expire after 30 days. Resources is a permanent library of how-tos and things worth watching or reading.

sections.title: Parea, the concierge
sections.body: Tap the chat bubble to ask Parea for a recommendation. It answers only from the community's own pins, vouches, and notes, and points you to members by name.

sections.title: Language and dark mode
sections.body: Switch between Greek and English, or light and dark, with the toggles at the top right. Members' notes are auto-translated, with a tap to see the original.

map.title: Map
map.loadError: The map couldn't load. Check your connection and refresh.
map.addPlaceTooltip: Add a place not already on the map

pin.placeErrorBody: Google didn't return details for this spot. Close the sheet and try again.

pin.pickPlaceError: Pick a place from the search results.

notFound.body: This page doesn’t exist or may have been moved.

resources.bodyPlaceholder: The full how-to, or why it's worth a look.
resources.permanentNote: Resources stay up permanently — you can edit or remove yours anytime.
resources.limitActive: You've reached the number of resources you can keep active. Remove one to add another.

activity.empty: Nothing yet. Pin a place to get the feed started.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This can't be undone.
settings.deleteAccountExplainer: Your pins and vouches will be retained but anonymised. Your private profile data will be erased.
settings.editProfileHelp: Update your display name, photo, Instagram, or website.

concierge.title: Ask Parea
concierge.subtitle: Answers come only from the community's vouches.
concierge.empty: Ask anything — "Where do I take my parents for 3 days near Tokyo?" — and Parea answers from what the community has vouched for, citing who said it.
concierge.errorBudget: Parea has used up this month's budget. Try again next month.
concierge.errorDaily: You've reached today's question limit. Ask again tomorrow.
concierge.errorNotConfigured: Parea isn't set up yet — ask Mako.
